context:
All mammals breathe air.
Fish live in water. Dolphins live in water.
Dolphins breathe air.
label: True
formalisations:
PREDICATES:
mammal(x) ::: x is a mammal
breathe_air(x) ::: x breathes air
fish(x) ::: x is a fish
live_in_water(x) ::: x lives in water

PREMISES:
forall x (mammal(x) -> breathe_air(x))
forall x (fish(x) -> live_in_water(x))
live_in_water(dolphins)
breathe_air(dolphins)

CONCLUSION:
mammal(dolphins)

PREDICATES:
mammal(x) ::: x is a mammal
breathe_air(x) ::: x breathes air
fish(x) ::: x is a fish
live_in_water(x) ::: x lives in water

PREMISES:
forall x (mammal(x) -> breathe_air(x))
forall x (fish(x) -> live_in_water(x))
forall x ((live_in_water(x) AND breathe_air(x)) -> mammal(x))
live_in_water(dolphins)
breathe_air(dolphins)

CONCLUSION:
mammal(dolphins)
